name: greenleaf-puc-extension
description: GreenLeaf PUC Tracker — cross-browser extension (Chrome, Firefox, Opera)

scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome  && cd dist/chrome   && zip -r ../../packages/greenleaf-chrome.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir packages --filename greenleaf-firefox.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:opera: npm run build:opera   && cd dist/opera    && zip -r ../../packages/greenleaf-opera.zip .
scripts.package:all: npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox && npm run package:opera
